mapper.sql: SELECT ir.id, ir.inspection_standard_id AS inspectionStandardId, ir.production_line_id AS productionLineId, pl.line_name AS productionLineName, ir.route_id AS routeId, ir.route_code AS routeCode, ir.route_name AS routeName, ir.plan_date AS planDate, ir.current_result AS currentResult, ir.abnormal_type AS abnormalType, ir.abnormal_phenomenon AS abnormalPhenomenon, ir.plan_source AS planSource, ir.standard_code AS standardCode, ir.part_code AS partCode, ir.part_name AS partName, ir.inspection_part AS inspectionPart, ir.inspection_content AS inspectionContent, ir.completed_at AS completedAt, ir.implementation_cycle AS implementationCycle, ir.cycle_unit AS cycleUnit, ir.completion_flag AS completionFlag, ir.qualitative_standard AS qualitativeStandard, ir.standard_category AS standardCategory, ir.quantitative_standard AS quantitativeStandard, ir.unit_of_measurement AS unitOfMeasurement, ir.upper_limit AS upperLimit, ir.lower_limit AS lowerLimit, ir.id_location_code AS idLocationCode, ir.id_location_name AS idLocationName, ir.abnormal_contact_sheet AS abnormalContactSheet, ir.creator_id AS creatorId, su.username AS creatorUsername, su.real_name AS creatorName, ir.created_at AS createdAt, ir.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM inspection_record ir LEFT JOIN production_line pl ON ir.production_line_id = pl.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ir.creator_id = su.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inspection_record ( inspection_standard_id, production_line_id, route_id, route_code, route_name, plan_date, current_result, abnormal_type, abnormal_phenomenon, plan_source, standard_code, part_code, part_name, inspection_part, inspection_content, completed_at, implementation_cycle, cycle_unit, completion_flag, qualitative_standard, standard_category, quantitative_standard, unit_of_measurement, upper_limit, lower_limit, id_location_code, id_location_name, abnormal_contact_sheet, creator_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{inspectionStandardId}, #{productionLineId}, #{routeId}, #{routeCode}, #{routeName}, #{planDate}, #{currentResult}, #{abnormalType}, #{abnormalPhenomenon}, #{planSource}, #{standardCode}, #{partCode}, #{partName}, #{inspectionPart}, #{inspectionContent}, #{completedAt}, #{implementationCycle}, #{cycleUnit}, #{completionFlag}, #{qualitativeStandard}, #{standardCategory}, #{quantitativeStandard}, #{unitOfMeasurement}, #{upperLimit}, #{lowerLimit}, #{idLocationCode}, #{idLocationName}, #{abnormalContactSheet}, #{creatorId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM inspection_record WHERE id = #{id} AND creator_id = #{creatorId}
DELETE FROM inspection_record WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND id IN #{id}
